steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $4$, so the answer is C, 4. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute x = 7 into the function definition
steps.content:
To find $f(7)$, we replace every instance of $x$ with 7 in the function $f(x) = \frac{3x - 1}{5}$.
$$f(7) = \frac{3(7) - 1}{5}$$

steps.title: Simplify the numerator and evaluate
steps.content:
Calculate the numerator: $3(7) - 1 = 21 - 1 = 20$.

Then divide:
$$\frac{20}{5} = 4$$
That matches Choice C — 4.
